tasks.prompt:
AESTHETIC AGENT A — Style Fidelity for Zelda: Echoes of Wisdom pixel art.
EMOTIONAL: bright/warm/charming/friendly Hyrule mood; saturated greens/blues/yellows/pinks; round friendly silhouettes; toy-diorama. Never grim/scary.
TECHNICAL: 1px hard outlines (no AA); 2-3 tone hard shading; pixel-grid-snapped; hand-pixeled. Fail either axis = fail.
Read: E:\cv5\wisdom\tools\asset-gen\screened\work\amulet_protection_v00\zoom.png (candidate at multiple zooms/bgs)
Read: E:\cv5\wisdom\tools\asset-gen\reference-sheets\denzi-tech-items-ref.png (Denzi peer reference for category "accessory")
Evaluate emotional (60%) + technical (40%).
Return ONLY a single JSON object (no markdown fences, no extra text):
{"agent":"<agent_id>","score":<integer 1-10>,"verdict":"pass|marginal|fail","issues":[],"reasoning":"..."}
Adversarial agents add: ,"confidence":<float 0.0-1.0>
Thresholds: 8+ pass, 5-7 marginal, <=4 fail.

AESTHETIC AGENT B — Cute & Charm + Silhouette Clarity. Reference: Echoes of Wisdom — distinct silhouette + friendly toy charm. Good = round/soft, instantly readable at 1x, contrast on bright AND dark bg, visible personality, sticker test. Bad = mushy silhouette, edgy aggressive shapes, no personality.
Read: E:\cv5\wisdom\tools\asset-gen\screened\work\amulet_protection_v00\zoom.png (1x grey | 4x clean | 4x DARK | 4x LIGHT)
Evaluate readability at 1x, contrast on both bgs, edge cleanliness, CHARM. Charming-but-mushy or clear-but-charmless both fail.
Return ONLY a single JSON object (no markdown fences, no extra text):
{"agent":"<agent_id>","score":<integer 1-10>,"verdict":"pass|marginal|fail","issues":[],"reasoning":"..."}
Adversarial agents add: ,"confidence":<float 0.0-1.0>
Thresholds: 8+ pass, 5-7 marginal, <=4 fail.

AESTHETIC AGENT C — Color Harmony for Echoes-tuned palette. Target: BRIGHT harmonious — saturated greens/sky blues/sunset oranges/candy pinks/parchment golds. Warm mid-values dominate. Shadows are colored darks (deep teal/plum/warm brown), NEVER pure black/grey. Avoid muddy desaturated, neon, cold corporate, goth near-black.
Read: E:\cv5\wisdom\tools\asset-gen\screened\work\amulet_protection_v00\zoom.png
Read: E:\cv5\wisdom\tools\asset-gen\reference-sheets\palette-extract.png (Echoes-tuned palette swatch)
Evaluate internal harmony, mood (BRIGHT/WARM vs grim/cold), saturation, palette compatibility, shadow color quality.
Return ONLY a single JSON object (no markdown fences, no extra text):

Adversarial agents add: ,"confidence":<float 0.0-1.0>
Thresholds: 8+ pass, 5-7 marginal, <=4 fail.

IN-TONE: cute round, bright saturated, whimsical sparkle. OUT-OF-TONE (FLAG): grimdark/horror, edgy/aggressive, realistic, cold-corporate, goth/metal, dungeon-crawler, anime fan-service, generic mobile cartoon.

ADVERSARIAL AGENT A — AI Artifact Hunter. DESTROY candidates by hunting AI generation tells. Be ruthless.
